release.body:

* feat!: create CLI interface ([d3374ea](https://github.com/imadtg/TKUS-CE/commit/d3374ea0efe9d869e9b013934626f5b030cdcb4b))

* actively prune items that get below the threshold during runtime ([#37](https://github.com/imadtg/TKUS-CE/issues/37)) ([749b8d2](https://github.com/imadtg/TKUS-CE/commit/749b8d2c6e8015fdb73c2e15449702740aaa0935))

* refactor loops over bitsets ([62d6cd9](https://github.com/imadtg/TKUS-CE/commit/62d6cd993dbdc8fc5e090e8bc5bbea5c081fe576))


### BREAKING CHANGES

* output file must now be specified explicitly!
